summary: ZERO-STACK Architecture Verification Complete (V53.4). Tested 53+ routes on mobile viewport 390x844. ALL ROUTES PASS - no crashes, no error boundaries. CRITICAL VERIFICATION: DeepDive.js and Teachings.js now expand content IN-PLACE (not as fixed overlays). No fixed elements with z-index >= 50 found on /teachings, /encyclopedia, /breathing, /oracle, /star-chart, /crystals, /herbology (except mixer nav at bottom). All 10 Mixer tabs work. Login flow works. SceneEngine backgrounds visible on /oracle, /crystals, /herbology with no dark blocking boxes.
critical_code_review_comments: DeepDive.js correctly rewritten: Uses AnimatePresence with height animation, NO position:fixed, content expands IN-PLACE below trigger button
Teachings.js ContemplationModal converted to in-place expansion with motion.div and height:auto animation
ZERO-STACK architecture verified: No fixed overlays with z-index >= 50 on key pages (except mixer nav)
SceneEngine backgrounds visible at full opacity on /oracle, /crystals, /herbology - no dark blocking boxes
All 10 Mixer tabs functional: orbit, mix, rec, audio, text, layer, fx, ai, out, me
Star Chart canvas renders correctly (390x844 WebGL canvas)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (53+ routes pass, all interactive features work)
